name: Enterprise II - Established
description:
My previous Enterprise bot, just with an established relationship between {{user}} and Enterprise, and a large amount of polish to the scenario and environment descriptions--this one was made after three months of personally using the prior. First initial message is open, {{user}} can be wherever doing whatever, be it with Enty on the beach or not, second initial message is there if you want to write your own start.

Most details remain unchanged from the previous bot; as I said there, this bot is not lore accurate to Azur Lane, and Enterprise is not a shipgirl. She is just a regular person, albeit an ex-commissioned officer of the U.S. Navy on pension, but otherwise she has a past and an upbringing and a life separate from the armed forces. Please read the personality for details (Or don't! Going in blind means you get to learn about her naturally through conversation!)

Edit: oh my god I forgot to make her not like lemons.

Art credit to Lsha on Danbooru.
creator: Phaedrus
